creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
The crash I mentioned doesn't happen with vips 8.9.0. I suspect it's related to this commit: https://github.com/libvips/libvips/commit/fda5e5c402b1cb57dda010d21c656e6f9d8d1544


Although, a new crash happens when I try to close photoflow without saving the changes: https://gist.github.com/daniloegea/083a8ecf2f0ada3c28e7ff58fb3a27ca
